

```{r}

rm(list = ls())

library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(reshape2)
library(ggsignif)
library(patchwork)
library(qs)
library(aplot)

'%ni%'=Negate('%in%')

setwd("~/TCR_Dynamic/Fig/Fig2_test/HC_vs_ICB/")

mycol <- c("#D62728", "#1F77B4",  "#FF7F0E", "#2CA02C", "#9467BD", "#8C564B", "#E377C2", "#BCBD22", "#17BECF", "#FF9896", "#AEC7E8", "#FFBB78", "#98DF8A",  "#C5B0D5",  "#C49C94",  "#F7B6D2", "#7F7F7F", "#DBDB8D", "#9EDAE5", "#45aab4","#fe7966","#81d0bb","#f9637c","#fbb45c","#038dW2","#FFDE99","#B8C8F5","#8fa2dc","#feaac2","#206491", "gold", "seagreen", "tomato", "#285d7c", "#f1d19e", "#e5807c", "#d7969a", "#eeebd8", "#d97d56", "#eecca9", "#eeeddb", "#494651", "#4b98a9", "#719eb6", "#679bc5", "#d94248", "#ebd66d", "#62985a", "#ecc832", "#e1a34e", "#ac3241", "#f5812d", "#d63833", "#ef5a30")

```



```{r}

patient_ratio <- qread("~/TCR_Dynamic/randomicity/HC_vs_ICB/patient_ratio.qs")

head(patient_ratio)

unique(patient_ratio$patient)
table(patient_ratio$Type)

```

```{r}


data4po <- patient_ratio[, c("patient","po_TCR_ratio", "T1_TCell", "T1_TCR","T1_TCell_pct",  "T1_TCR_pct", "T1_T2_TCell", "T1_T2_TCR","T1_clonality", "T1_div","depth", "Type", "datasets")] %>% unique()


result <- adjust_and_plot_perm(
  data = data4po,
  response = "po_TCR_ratio",
  group = "Type",
  adjust_covariates = c("T1_TCR_pct"),
  alpha = 0.05
)


po4box <- result$adjusted_data

```



```{r}

data4eg <- patient_ratio[, c("patient","eg_TCR_ratio",  "T2_TCell", "T2_TCell_pct", "T2_TCR", "T2_TCR_pct", "T2_T1_TCell", "T2_T1_TCR", "T2_div", "T2_clonality", "datasets" , "depth", "Type")] %>% unique()

data4eg$Type <- factor(data4eg$Type)

result <- adjust_and_plot_perm(
  data = data4eg,
  response = "eg_TCR_ratio",
  group = "Type",
  adjust_covariates = c("T2_TCR_pct"),
  alpha = 0.05
)


eg4box <- result$adjusted_data

```


```{r}

head(po4box)

po4box_1 <- po4box[, c("patient", "adjusted_value", "T1_TCR_pct", "po_TCR_ratio")]

eg4box_1 <- eg4box[, c("patient", "adjusted_value", "T2_TCR_pct", "eg_TCR_ratio")]

ts4box_1 <- left_join(po4box_1, eg4box_1, by = "patient")

colnames(ts4box_1)[c(2,5)] <- c("po_adj", "eg_adj")

head(ts4box_1)



ts4box_long <- ts4box_1 %>%
  gather(key = "status", value = "Ratio", po_adj, eg_adj, T1_TCR_pct, T2_TCR_pct, po_TCR_ratio, eg_TCR_ratio)

ts4box_long <- ts4box_long %>%
  mutate(Datasets = str_split(patient, "@", simplify = TRUE)[, 2])

ts4box_long <- ts4box_long %>%
  mutate(Datasets = str_split(Datasets, "_", simplify = TRUE)[, 1])


ts4box_long <- ts4box_long %>%
  mutate(
    Type = case_when(
      Datasets %in% c("SCC", "HN", "BCC", "Uro") ~ "ICB",
      TRUE ~ "HC"
    )
  )

head(ts4box_long)

ts4box_long$status <- factor(ts4box_long$status, levels = c("po_adj", "eg_adj", "T1_TCR_pct", "T2_TCR_pct", "po_TCR_ratio","eg_TCR_ratio"))


p2 <- ggplot(ts4box_long, aes(x = Type, y = as.numeric(Ratio), color = Type)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = Type), position = position_jitterdodge(0.6), alpha = 0.7, stroke = NA, shape = 19)+
  scale_size(range = c(0.2, 3), name = "T2") +
      stat_summary(fun.y = median, geom = 'crossbar', width = 0.3, size = 0.1, color = 'black') +
  stat_summary(fun.data = function(x) median_hilow(x, 0.5), geom = 'errorbar', width = 0.2, size = 0.15, color = 'black') +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#676767", "#F16541")) +
      # scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1.2, 0.2)) +
      ggtitle("") +
      labs(
        x = NULL, y = "TCR Ratio",
        fill = "Tissue"
      ) +
      theme_classic() +
      facet_wrap(~ status, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
      theme(
        axis.text.x = element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8, color = "black"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9),
        axis.line = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),
        axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.2),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid = element_blank(),
        panel.spacing = unit(0.4, "lines"),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "white"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold", colour = "black"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 7)
      ) +
      geom_signif(
        comparisons = list(c("HC", "ICB")), step_increase = 0.1,
        map_signif_level = F, test = wilcox.test, test.args = list(alternative = "two.side", paired = F),
        tip_length = 0, color = "black", size = 0.2, textsize = 2
      )

p2

```
